lastReleaseMessage: library grid: drop minmax floor from 78px to 64px so it doesn't collapse to one column in narrow editor panels; add min-width:0 safeguard

barRaise.topFinding: Process-stalled, not product-dead: the app is healthy and no HIGH or MEDIUM touches the label engine. Fifth consecutive daily bar-raise and the repo has not moved since the last one: latest commit is still 28fe3cd (2026-05-29), now predating two reports, and five review reports sit untracked in git (this makes six). Verdict steps at-risk to stalled under the picker rule (last review at-risk, nothing changed since). Every carryover is byte-identical and live-verified: 37 em-dashes across six public files, html2canvas still CDN-loaded, PROJECT_SPEC 4.4/4.5/11 still pre-v0.15, README still pitches 20 herbs vs a live 199, and write-dashboard-status.ps1 still clobbers barRaise and pins audit findings to 0/0/0 on every release. The loop cannot self-correct; a human must drain it once and fix the handoff.
